Features

Built for chess minds

01

Chess Puzzles

Hundreds of carefully curated puzzles — Mate in 1, 2, 3, and beyond. Complex multi-move combinations that will genuinely test your skills.

200+

Puzzles

Hand-picked challenges across all difficulty levels.

02

Hint System

Stuck? Get a nudge without spoiling the solution. Learn from every position.

03

100% Offline

No Wi-Fi? No problem. Perfect for flights, commutes, and anywhere in between.

04

Board Themes

Classic wood, royal purple, modern minimal. Make the board yours.

05

Challenge Mode

Timed challenges, harder puzzles, coin rewards. Push your limits.
